expectations.evidence: Sonnet is the right call—classification is a single-pass judgment task
No headers, no analysis steps, direct verdict in first sentence
Saves ~60% tokens (vs Opus); also suggests escalation pattern for ambiguous issues
Response is 2 sentences ~50 words — well under limit

notes: Excellent. Adds value beyond baseline: the escalation pattern (flag ambiguous → Sonnet, escalate 2-5 unclear → Opus) is a genuinely useful optimization the baseline didn't surface.
